ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the scene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the scene was last updated */,
  "scene_type" TEXT /* Type of the scene (e.g., indoor, outdoor, action) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scene (e.g., draft, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scene */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the scene */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the scene is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scene_objects" (
  "scene_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene-object relationship */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene the object belongs to */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object within the scene */,
  "object_role" TEXT /* Role of the object within the scene (e.g., main character, background) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the object's role in the scene */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the object's role in the scene */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object within the scene (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the object to the scene */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object's role in the scene */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the object's role in the scene is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_objects_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., animator, modeler, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene if the action is related to a scene */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object if the action is related to an object */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the animation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the animation type was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the animation type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the animation type was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the animation type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the animation type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animation_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animation_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the object */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the object */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  "versioned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the version was created */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to create the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
